title: Automate daily blog topic generation with approval-only posts
scope: Generate relevant TenantGuard-focused topics daily when auto-posting is enabled
Enforce medium quality checks before saving AI-generated posts
Keep all automated posts in pending approval status
acceptance_criteria: The scheduler creates daily topics relevant to TenantGuard when none exist for the day
AI-generated posts fail early if medium quality checks are not met
Automated posts are queued for approval and not published directly
CHANGELOG.md includes an entry for this work order
risk_notes: Topic generation depends on LLM availability and may silently skip on failures
Quality checks are heuristic and may reject valid content occasionally
rollback_plan: Revert topic generation and quality checks and remove the workorder/changelog entry
